def main()
  n, x = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  relics = []
  n.times do
    r, b, w = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    relics << [r, b, w]
  end
  
  max_b = relics.map { |r| r[1] }.max
  
  can_achieve = lambda do |min_val|
    dp = Array.new(x + 1) { Array.new(min_val + 1) { Array.new(min_val + 1) { Array.new(min_val + 1, false) } } }
    dp[0][0][0][0] = true
    
    relics.each do |r, b, w|
      new_dp = dp.map { |a| a.map { |b| b.map(&:dup) } }
      
      (0..x).each do |weight|
        next if weight + w > x
        
        (0..min_val).each do |e1|
          (0..min_val).each do |e2|
            (0..min_val).each do |e3|
              next unless dp[weight][e1][e2][e3]
              
              new_weight = weight + w
              new_e1 = e1
              new_e2 = e2
              new_e3 = e3
              
              if r == 1
                new_e1 = [e1 + b, min_val].min
              elsif r == 2
                new_e2 = [e2 + b, min_val].min
              else
                new_e3 = [e3 + b, min_val].min
              end
              
              new_dp[new_weight][new_e1][new_e2][new_e3] = true
            end
          end
        end
      end
      
      dp = new_dp
    end
    
    (0..x).each do |weight|
      return true if dp[weight][min_val][min_val][min_val]
    end
    
    false
  end
  
  left = 0
  right = max_b
  answer = 0
  
  while left <= right
    mid = (left + right) / 2
    if can_achieve.call(mid)
      answer = mid
      left = mid + 1
    else
      right = mid - 1
    end
  end
  
  puts answer
end

            low = mid + 1
            continue
            
        w1 = get_min_weight(0, mid)
        w2 = get_min_weight(1, mid)
        w3 = get_min_weight(2, mid)
        
        if w1 + w2 + w3 <= X:
            ans = mid
            low = mid + 1
        else:
            high = mid - 1
            
    print(ans)

def main
  input = STDIN.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0]
  x_limit = input[1]
  
  relics_by_type = Array.new(4) { [] }
  idx = 2
  n.times do
    r = input[idx]
    b = input[idx + 1]
    w = input[idx + 2]
    relics_by_type[r] << [b, w]
    idx += 3
  end

  def solve_knapsack(items, x_limit)
    dp = Array.new(x_limit + 1, -1)
    dp[0] = 0
    items.each do |b, w|
      x_limit.downto(w) do |j|
        if dp[j - w] != -1
          new_val = dp[j - w] + b
          dp[j] = new_val if new_val > dp[j]
        end
      end
    end
    dp
  end

  dp1 = solve_knapsack(relics_by_type[1], x_limit)
  dp2 = solve_knapsack(relics_by_type[2], x_limit)
  dp3 = solve_knapsack(relics_by_type[3], x_limit)

  def check(mid, dp1, dp2, dp3, x_limit)
    min_w1 = Float::INFINITY
    dp1.each_with_index { |v, w| min_w1 = w if v >= mid && w < min_w1 }
    return false if min_w1 > x_limit

    min_w2 = Float::INFINITY
    dp2.each_with_index { |v, w| min_w2 = w if v >= mid && w < min_w2 }
    return false if min_w1 + min_w2 > x_limit

    min_w3 = Float::INFINITY
    dp3.each_with_index { |v, w| min_w3 = w if v >= mid && w < min_w3 }
    
    min_w1 + min_w2 + min_w3 <= x_limit
  end

  low = 0
  high = n * 200000
  ans = 0

  while low <= high
    mid = (low + high) / 2
    if mid == 0
      ans = [ans, 0].max
      low = 1
      next
    end
    if check(mid, dp1, dp2, dp3, x_limit)
      ans = mid
      low = mid + 1
    else
      high = mid - 1
    end
  end

  puts ans
end

def compute_g(arr)
  return 0 if arr.empty?
  
  unique = arr.uniq.sort
  return 0 if unique.empty?
  
  operations = 1
  (1...unique.length).each do |i|
    if unique[i] != unique[i-1] + 1
      operations += 1
    end
  end
  
  operations
end

    end

  puts total
end

def solve():

    s = list(map(int, input_data[1:]))

    for i, val in enumerate(s):
        pos[val].append(i + 1)
    
    for v in range(1, n + 1):
        pos[v].append(n + 1)
    
    total_g = 0
    
    for v in range(1, n + 1):
        p_v = pos[v]
        p_prev = pos[v-1]
        p_next = pos[v+1]
        
        last_v = 0
        for i in range(len(p_v) - 1):
            curr_v = p_v[i]
            next_v = p_v[i+1]
            
            l_limit = 0
            low = 0
            high = len(p_prev) - 1
            while low <= high:
                mid = (low + high)
                if p_prev[mid] < curr_v:
                    l_limit = p_prev[mid]
                    low = mid + 1
                else:
                    high = mid - 1
            
            r_limit = n + 1
            low = 0
            high = len(p_next) - 1
            while low <= high:
                mid = (low + high)
                if p_next[mid] >= curr_v:
                    r_limit = min(r_limit, p_next[mid])
                    high = mid - 1
                else:
                    low = mid + 1
            
            L = max(last_v + 1, l_limit + 1)
            R = min(next_v - 1, r_limit - 1)
            
            if L <= curr_v <= R:
                count = (curr_v - L + 1) * (R - curr_v + 1)
                total_g += count
            last_v = curr_v
            
    print(total_g)

MOD = 998244353

def mod_pow(base, exp, mod)
  result = 1
  base = base % mod
  while exp > 0
    if exp % 2 == 1
      result = (result * base) % mod
    end
    exp = exp >> 1
    base = (base * base) % mod
  end
  result
end

def mod_inv(a, mod)
  mod_pow(a, mod - 2, mod)
end

  n, c = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  
  crates = []
  n.times do |i|
    p, q = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    crates << [p, q, i + 1]
  end
  
  queries_count = gets.to_i
  queries = []
  queries_count.times do
    t, r = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    queries << [t, r]
  end
  
  max_time = queries.map { |t, r| t }.max
  
  active_crates = {}
  crates.each_with_index do |crate, idx|
    active_crates[idx + 1] = [crate[0], crate[1]]
  end
  
  removed_at = {}
  
  (1..max_time).each do |time|
    positions = {}
    active_crates.each do |id, (x, y)|
      positions[[x, y]] = id
    end
    
    level_1_cols = {}
    active_crates.each do |id, (x, y)|
      if y == 1
        level_1_cols[x] = true
      end
    end
    
    if level_1_cols.size == c
      to_remove = []
      active_crates.each do |id, (x, y)|
        if y == 1
          to_remove << id
        end
      end
      to_remove.each do |id|
        active_crates.delete(id)
        removed_at[id] = time
      end
      
      positions = {}
      active_crates.each do |id, (x, y)|
        positions[[x, y]] = id
      end
    end
    
    new_positions = {}
    
    crate_list = active_crates.to_a.sort_by { |id, (x, y)| y }
    
    crate_list.each do |id, (x, y)|
      if y == 1
        new_positions[id] = [x, y]
      elsif new_positions.values.any? { |nx, ny| nx == x && ny == y - 1 } || 
            (active_crates.any? { |oid, (ox, oy)| oid != id && !new_positions.key?(oid) && ox == x && oy == y - 1 })
        new_positions[id] = [x, y]
      else
        new_positions[id] = [x, y - 1]
      end
    end
    
    active_crates = new_positions
  end
  
  queries.each do |t, r|
    if removed_at[r] && removed_at[r] <= t
      puts "No"
    elsif active_crates[r]
      puts "Yes"
    else
      puts "No"
    end
  end
end

import sys

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    ptr = 0
    N = int(input_data[ptr])
    ptr += 1
    C = int(input_data[ptr])
    ptr += 1
    
    cols = [[] for _ in range(C + 1)]
    for i in range(1, N + 1):
        p = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        q = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        cols[p].append((q, i))
    
    for c in range(1, C + 1):
        cols[c].sort()
    
    depths = [0] * N
    for c in range(1, C + 1):
        for i, (q, idx) in enumerate(cols[c]):
            depths[idx - 1] = q - (i + 1)
            
    q_count = int(input_data[ptr])
    ptr += 1
    
    col_depths = []
    for c in range(1, C + 1):
        if not cols[c]:
            col_depths.append(float('inf'))
        else:
            col_depths.append(len(cols[c]))
    
    if C == 0:
        for _ in range(q_count):
            print("No")
        return

    full_levels = []
    for i in range(N):
        max_h = 0
        for c in range(1, C + 1):
            if i < len(cols[c]):
                max_h = max(max_h, cols[c][i][0] - (i + 1))
            else:
                max_h = float('inf')
                break
        if max_h == float('inf'):
            break
        full_levels.append(max_h)

    for i in range(1, len(full_levels)):
        full_levels[i] = max(full_levels[i], full_levels[i-1] + 1)

    results = []
    for _ in range(q_count):
        t = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        r = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        
        d = depths[r - 1]
        if t < d:
            results.append("Yes")
            continue
        
        rem_t = t - d
        
        low = 0
        high = len(full_levels) - 1
        ans_level = -1
        while low <= high:
            mid = (low + high)
            if full_levels[mid] <= rem_t:
                ans_level = mid
                low = mid + 1
            else:
                high = mid - 1
        
        p_r = -1
        q_r_initial = -1
        for i in range(1, N + 1):

            pass
            

    crate_info = [None] * (N + 1)
    for c in range(1, C + 1):
        for i, (q, idx) in enumerate(cols[c]):
            crate_info[idx] = (i, depths[idx-1])

    results = []
    for _ in range(q_count):
        t = int(input_data[ptr - 2])
        t = int(input_data[ptr - 2])
        r = int(input_data[ptr - 1])

    
    ptr = ptr - 2*q_count
    results = []
    for _ in range(q_count):
        t = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        r = int(input_data[ptr])
        ptr += 1
        
        idx_in_col, d = crate_info[r]
        if t < d:
            results.append("Yes")
            continue

def main
  n, c = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  crates = []
  n.times do |i|
    p, q = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    crates << { p: p, q: q, id: i + 1 }
  end

  cols = Array.new(c + 1) { [] }
  crates.each { |cr| cols[cr[:p]] << cr }
  cols.each { |col| col.sort_by! { |cr| cr[:q] } }

  fall_times = Array.new(n + 1)
  
  cols.each do |col|
    col.each_with_index do |cr, idx|
      fall_times[cr[:id]] = cr[:q] - (idx + 1)
    end
  end

  final_levels = Array.new(n + 1)
  cols.each do |col|
    col.each_with_index do |cr, idx|
      final_levels[cr[:id]] = idx + 1
    end
  end

  level_max_fall = []
  cols.each do |col|
    col.each_with_index do |cr, idx|
      level = idx + 1
      level_max_fall[level] ||= 0
      level_max_fall[level] = fall_times[cr[:id]] if fall_times[cr[:id]] > level_max_fall[level]
    end
  end

  row_removal_time = Array.new(n + 2, 0)
  (1..n).each do |i|
    row_removal_time[i] = [row_removal_time[i - 1] + 1, level_max_fall[i] || 0].max
  end

  q_count = gets.to_i
  results = []
  q_count.times do
    t, r = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    
    ft = fall_times[r]
    fl = final_levels[r]
    
    if t < ft
      results << "Yes"
    else
      if t < row_removal_time[fl]
        results << "Yes"
      else
        results << "No"
      end
    end
  end

  puts results
end

def fusion(s)
  return s if s.length == 1
  result = ""
  (0...s.length).step(3) do |i|
    a, b, c = s[i].to_i, s[i+1].to_i, s[i+2].to_i
    sum = a + b + c
    result += (sum >= 2 ? "1" : "0")
  end
  result
end

def apply_fusion_n_times(s, n)
  n.times do
    s = fusion(s)
  end
  s
end

def min_changes_to_flip(s, n, memo = {})
  key = [s, n]
  return memo[key] if memo.key?(key)
  
  if n == 0
    return memo[key] = 1
  end
  
  groups = []
  (0...s.length).step(3) do |i|
    groups << s[i..i+2]
  end
  
  fused = fusion(s)
  target = fused[0] == '0' ? '1' : '0'
  
  min_cost = Float::INFINITY
  
  def generate_combinations(num_groups)
    return [[]] if num_groups == 0
    rest = generate_combinations(num_groups - 1)
    result = []
    [0, 1].each do |choice|
      rest.each do |r|
        result << [choice] + r
      end
    end
    result
  end
  
  combinations = generate_combinations(groups.length)
  
  combinations.each do |choices|
    new_fused = ""
    total_cost = 0
    
    choices.each_with_index do |choice, idx|
      group = groups[idx]
      a, b, c = group[0].to_i, group[1].to_i, group[2].to_i
      sum = a + b + c
      current = sum >= 2 ? 1 : 0
      
      if choice == current
        new_fused += current.to_s
      else
        new_fused += choice.to_s
        if current == 1
          total_cost += 2
        else
          total_cost += 1
        end
      end
    end
    
    if new_fused.length == 1
      if new_fused[0] == target
        min_cost = [min_cost, total_cost].min
      end
    else
      remaining = min_changes_to_flip(new_fused, n - 1, memo)
      min_cost = [min_cost, total_cost + remaining].min
    end
  end
  
  memo[key] = min_cost
end

def main()
  n = gets.to_i
  d = gets.strip
  
  final = apply_fusion_n_times(d, n)
  
  result = min_changes_to_flip(d, n)
  
  puts result
end

def solve
  n = gets.to_i
  s = gets.strip
  if s.empty?
    s = gets.strip
  end
  
  data = s.chars.map(&:to_i)
  
  dp = data.map do |val|
    if val == 0
      [0, 1]
    else
      [1, 0]
    end
  end
  
  n.times do
    next_dp = []
    (0...dp.length).step(3) do |i|
      g = [dp[i], dp[i+1], dp[i+2]]
      
      cost_to_0 = [
        g[0][0] + g[1][0],
        g[0][0] + g[2][0],
        g[1][0] + g[2][0]
      ].min
      
      cost_to_1 = [
        g[0][1] + g[1][1],
        g[0][1] + g[2][1],
        g[1][1] + g[2][1]
      ].min
      
      next_dp << [cost_to_0, cost_to_1]
    end
    dp = next_dp
  end
  
  final_0, final_1 = dp[0]
  
  current_val = -1
  temp_data = data.dup
  n.times do
    next_temp = []
    (0...temp_data.length).step(3) do |i|
      sum = temp_data[i] + temp_data[i+1] + temp_data[i+2]
      next_temp << (sum >= 2 ? 1 : 0)
    end
    temp_data = next_temp
  end
  current_val = temp_data[0]
  
  if current_val == 0
    puts final_1
  else
    puts final_0
  end
end

import heapq

def main():
    N, K = map(int, input().split())
    X = list(map(int, input().split()))
    Y = list(map(int, input().split()))
    Z = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    X.sort(reverse=True)
    Y.sort(reverse=True)
    Z.sort(reverse=True)
    
    def calc_score(i, j, k):
        return X[i] * Y[j] + Y[j] * Z[k] + Z[k] * X[i]
    
    heap = []
    heapq.heappush(heap, (-calc_score(0, 0, 0), 0, 0, 0))
    visited = set()
    visited.add((0, 0, 0))
    
    count = 0
    result = 0
    
    while heap and count < K:
        neg_score, i, j, k = heapq.heappop(heap)
        score = -neg_score
        count += 1
        
        if count == K:
            result = score
            break
        
        if i + 1 < N and (i + 1, j, k) not in visited:
            visited.add((i + 1, j, k))
            heapq.heappush(heap, (-calc_score(i + 1, j, k), i + 1, j, k))
        
        if j + 1 < N and (i, j + 1, k) not in visited:
            visited.add((i, j + 1, k))
            heapq.heappush(heap, (-calc_score(i, j + 1, k), i, j + 1, k))
        
        if k + 1 < N and (i, j, k + 1) not in visited:
            visited.add((i, j, k + 1))
            heapq.heappush(heap, (-calc_score(i, j, k + 1), i, j, k + 1))
    
    print(result)

def main()
  n, k = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  x = gets.split.map(&:to_i).sort.reverse
  y = gets.split.map(&:to_i).sort.reverse
  z = gets.split.map(&:to_i).sort.reverse
  
  calc_score = lambda do |i, j, k|
    x[i] * y[j] + y[j] * z[k] + z[k] * x[i]
  end
  
  heap = []
  visited = Set.new
  
  initial_score = calc_score.call(0, 0, 0)
  heap << [-initial_score, 0, 0, 0]
  visited.add([0, 0, 0])
  
  result = 0
  k.times do
    neg_score, i, j, k_idx = heap.shift
    score = -neg_score
    result = score
    
    [[i+1, j, k_idx], [i, j+1, k_idx], [i, j, k_idx+1]].each do |ni, nj, nk|
      if ni < n && nj < n && nk < n && !visited.include?([ni, nj, nk])
        visited.add([ni, nj, nk])
        new_score = calc_score.call(ni, nj, nk)
        insert_pos = heap.bsearch_index { |item| item[0] >= -new_score } || heap.size
        heap.insert(insert_pos, [-new_score, ni, nj, nk])
      end
    end
  end
  
  puts result
end

def main
  input = STDIN.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  n = input[0]
  k = input[1]
  
  x = input[2, n].sort.reverse
  y = input[n + 2, n].sort.reverse
  z = input[2 * n + 2, n].sort.reverse
  
  pq = PriorityQueue.new { |a, b| a[0] > b[0] }
  
  initial_score = x[0] * y[0] + y[0] * z[0] + z[0] * x[0]
  pq.push([initial_score, 0, 0, 0])
  
  visited = Set.new
  visited.add(0)
  
  count = 0
  while count < k
    score, i, j, l = pq.pop
    count += 1
    
    if count == k
      puts score
      return
    end
    
    if i + 1 < n
      idx = (i + 1) * 10000000000 + j * 100000 + l
      unless visited.include?(idx)
        new_score = x[i + 1] * y[j] + y[j] * z[l] + z[l] * x[i + 1]
        pq.push([new_score, i + 1, j, l])
        visited.add(idx)
      end
    end
    
    if j + 1 < n
      idx = i * 10000000000 + (j + 1) * 100000 + l
      unless visited.include?(idx)
        new_score = x[i] * y[j + 1] + y[j + 1] * z[l] + z[l] * x[i]
        pq.push([new_score, i, j + 1, l])
        visited.add(idx)
      end
    end
    
    if l + 1 < n
      idx = i * 10000000000 + j * 100000 + (l + 1)
      unless visited.include?(idx)
        new_score = x[i] * y[j] + y[j] * z[l + 1] + z[l + 1] * x[i]
        pq.push([new_score, i, j, l + 1])
        visited.add(idx)
      end
    end
  end
end

class PriorityQueue
  def initialize(&comparator)
    @heap = []
    @comparator = comparator
  end

  def push(element)
    @heap << element
    bubble_up(@heap.size - 1)
  end

  def pop
    return nil if @heap.empty?
    swap(0, @heap.size - 1)
    result = @heap.pop
    bubble_down(0)
    result
  end

  private

  def bubble_up(index)
    parent = (index - 1) / 2
    if index > 0 && @comparator.call(@heap[index], @heap[parent])
      swap(index, parent)
      bubble_up(parent)
    end
  end

  def bubble_down(index)
    child = index * 2 + 1
    return if child >= @heap.size
    child += 1 if child + 1 < @heap.size && @comparator.call(@heap[child + 1], @heap[child])
    if @comparator.call(@heap[child], @heap[index])
      swap(index, child)
      bubble_down(child)
    end
  end

  def swap(i, j)
    @heap[i], @heap[j] = @heap[j], @heap[i]
  end
end

MOD = 998244353

def lcs_length(s1, s2)
  n, m = s1.length, s2.length
  dp = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(m + 1, 0) }
  
  (1..n).each do |i|
    (1..m).each do |j|
      if s1[i-1] == s2[j-1]
        dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] + 1
      else
        dp[i][j] = [dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1]].max
      end
    end
  end
  
  dp[n][m]
end

def main()
  n, l = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  b = gets.strip
  
  dp = Array.new(l + 1) { Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(n + 1, 0) } }
  
  dp[0][0][0] = 1
  
  (0...l).each do |pos|
    (0..n).each do |b_idx|
      (0..n).each do |lcs_len|
        next if dp[pos][b_idx][lcs_len] == 0
        
        ('a'..'z').each do |c|
          new_b_idx = b_idx
          new_lcs = lcs_len
          
          while new_b_idx < n && b[new_b_idx] != c
            new_b_idx += 1
          end
          
          if new_b_idx < n
            new_lcs = lcs_len + 1
            new_b_idx += 1
          end
          
          dp[pos + 1][new_b_idx][new_lcs] = (dp[pos + 1][new_b_idx][new_lcs] + dp[pos][b_idx][lcs_len]) % MOD
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  result = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0..n).each do |b_idx|
    (0..n).each do |lcs_len|
      result[lcs_len] = (result[lcs_len] + dp[l][b_idx][lcs_len]) % MOD
    end
  end
  
  puts result.join(' ')
end

def solve
  input = $stdin.read.split
  return if input.empty?
  n = input[0].to_i
  l = input[1].to_i
  b = input[2]
  mod = 998244353

  next_pos = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(26, n) }
  (n - 1).downto(0) do |i|
    26.times { |c| next_pos[i][c] = next_pos[i + 1][c] }
    next_pos[i][b[i].ord - 'a'.ord] = i
  end

  states = {}
  states[1] = 1
  
  l.times do
    new_states = Hash.new(0)
    states.each do |mask, count|
      26.times do |char_idx|
        new_mask = 1
        (0..n-1).each do |i|
          if (mask & (1 << i)) != 0
            pos = next_pos[i][char_idx]
            if pos < n
              new_mask |= (1 << (pos + 1))
            end
          end
        end
        new_states[new_mask] = (new_states[new_mask] + count) % mod
      end
    end
    states = new_states
  end

  ans = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  states.each do |mask, count|
    k = 0
    (n).downto(0) do |i|
      if (mask & (1 << i)) != 0
        k = i
        break
      end
    end
    ans[k] = (ans[k] + count) % mod
  end

  puts ans.join(' ')
end

from collections import Counter

def main():
    n = int(input())
    wheels = []
    
    for _ in range(n):
        line = list(map(int, input().split()))
        m = line[0]
        symbols = line[1:m+1]
        wheels.append(symbols)
    
    max_prob = 0.0
    
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i+1, n):
            wheel_i = wheels[i]
            wheel_j = wheels[j]
            
            counter_i = Counter(wheel_i)
            counter_j = Counter(wheel_j)
            
            m_i = len(wheel_i)
            m_j = len(wheel_j)
            
            matching_count = 0
            for symbol in counter_i:
                if symbol in counter_j:
                    matching_count += counter_i[symbol] * counter_j[symbol]
            
            prob = matching_count / (m_i * m_j)
            max_prob = max(max_prob, prob)
    
    print(max_prob)

    symbols.each { |s| counts[s] += 1 }
    wheels << {m: m, counts: counts}
  end

  max_prob = 0.0

  (0...n).each do |i|
    ((i + 1)...n).each do |j|
      w1 = wheels[i]
      w2 = wheels[j]
      
      common_sum = 0
      
      if w1[:counts].size < w2[:counts].size
        w1[:counts].each do |symbol, count|
          if w2[:counts].key?(symbol)
            common_sum += count * w2[:counts][symbol]
          end
        end
      else
        w2[:counts].each do |symbol, count|
          if w1[:counts].key?(symbol)
            common_sum += count * w1[:counts][symbol]
          end
        end
      end
      
      prob = common_sum.to_f / (w1[:m] * w2[:m])
      max_prob = prob if prob > max_prob
    end
  end

  printf("%.15f\n", max_prob)
end

def main
  n = gets.to_i
  p_arr = gets.split.map(&:to_i)

  left = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  right = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  size = Array.new(n + 1, 1)
  val = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  priority = Array.new(n + 1) { rand }
  
  root = 0

  split = lambda do |t, k|
    return [0, 0] if t == 0
    left_size = size[left[t]] + 1
    if left_size <= k
      r1, r2 = split.call(right[t], k - left_size)
      right[t] = r1
      size[t] = size[left[t]] + size[right[t]] + 1
      return [t, r2]
    else
      r1, r2 = split.call(left[t], k)
      left[t] = r2
      size[t] = size[left[t]] + size[right[t]] + 1
      return [r1, t]
    end
  end

  merge = lambda do |l, r|
    return r if l == 0
    return l if r == 0
    if priority[l] > priority[r]
      right[l] = merge.call(right[l], r)
      size[l] = size[left[l]] + size[right[l]] + 1
      return l
    else
      left[r] = merge.call(l, left[r])
      size[r] = size[left[r]] + size[right[r]] + 1
      return r
    end
  end

  (1..n).each do |i|
    pos = p_arr[i - 1]
    val[i] = i
    t1, t2 = split.call(root, pos - 1)
    root = merge.call(merge.call(t1, i), t2)
  end

  result = []
  stack = [[root, false]]
  while !stack.empty?
    curr, visited = stack.pop
    next if curr == 0
    if visited
      result << val[curr]
    else
      stack << [right[curr], false]
      stack << [curr, true]
      stack << [left[curr], false]
    end
  end

  puts result.join(' ')
end

require 'complex'

def main
  input = STDIN.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  n = input[0]
  t = input[1..n]
  
  max_t = 0
  t.each { |val| max_t = val if val > max_t }
  
  m = 1
  m <<= 1 while m <= 2 * max_t
  
  a = Array.new(m, 0)
  t.each { |val| a[val] = 1 }
  
  fa = fft(a, false)
  fa_sq = fa.map { |z| z * z }
  res = fft(fa_sq, true)
  
  ans = 0
  t.each do |y|
    count_sum_2y = (res[2 * y].real + 0.5).to_i
    ans += (count_sum_2y - 1) / 2
  end
  
  puts ans
end

def fft(a, invert)
  n = a.size
  j = 0
  1.upto(n - 1) do |i|
    bit = n >> 1
    while j & bit != 0
      j ^= bit
      bit >>= 1
    end
    j ^= bit
    a[i], a[j] = a[j], a[i] if i < j
  end

  len = 2
  while len <= n
    ang = 2 * Math::PI / len * (invert ? -1 : 1)
    wlen = Complex(Math.cos(ang), Math.sin(ang))
    (0...n).step(len) do |i|
      w = Complex(1, 0)
      (0...len / 2).each do |k|
        u = a[i + k]
        v = a[i + k + len / 2] * w
        a[i + k] = u + v
        a[i + k + len / 2] = u - v
        w *= wlen
      end
    end
    len <<= 1
  end

  if invert
    n_inv = 1.0 / n
    (0...n).each { |i| a[i] *= n_inv }
  end
  a
end

  while b != 0
    a, b = b, a % b
  end
  a

def get_divisors(n)
  divisors = []
  i = 1
  while i * i <= n
    if n % i == 0
      divisors << i
      if i != n / i
        divisors << n / i
      end
    end
    i += 1
  end
  divisors.sort.reverse
end

def lis_length(arr)
  return 0 if arr.empty?
  
  tails = []
  
  arr.each do |x|
    left, right = 0, tails.length
    while left < right
      mid = (left + right) / 2
      if tails[mid] < x
        left = mid + 1
      else
        right = mid
      end
    end
    
    if left == tails.length
      tails << x
    else
      tails[left] = x
    end
  end
  
  tails.length
end

import sys

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    n = int(input_data[0])
    q = int(input_data[1])
    
    r = list(map(int, input_data[2:n+2]))
    
    queries = []
    ptr = n + 2
    for i in range(q):
        k = int(input_data[ptr])
        t = int(input_data[ptr+1])
        queries.append((k, t, i))
        ptr += 2
    
    queries.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    
    ans = [0] * q
    
    inf = 2 * 10**9
    tree_size = 1
    while tree_size <= n + 1:
        tree_size *= 2
    tree = [inf] * (2 * tree_size)
    
    def update(idx, val):
        idx += tree_size
        if tree[idx] <= val:
            return
        tree[idx] = val
        while idx > 1:
            idx
            tree[idx] = min(tree[2*idx], tree[2*idx+1])
            
    def query_first_greater(val):
        if tree[1] > val:
            return n + 1
        node = 1
        while node < tree_size:
            if tree[2*node] <= val:
                node = 2 * node
            else:
                node = 2 * node + 1
        return node - tree_size

    update(0, 0)
    
    current_k = 0
    for k, t, idx in queries:
        while current_k < k:
            val = r[current_k]
            low = 0
            high = n
            best_pos = 0
            
            l, r_idx = 0, n
            while l <= r_idx:
                mid = (l + r_idx)
                node = mid + tree_size
                if tree[node] < val:
                    best_pos = mid
                    l = mid + 1
                else:
                    r_idx = mid - 1
            
            update(best_pos + 1, val)
            current_k += 1
            
        l, r_idx = 0, n
        res = 0
        while l <= r_idx:
            mid = (l + r_idx)
            node = mid + tree_size
            if tree[node] <= t:
                res = mid
                l = mid + 1
            else:
                r_idx = mid - 1
        ans[idx] = res

    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(map(str, ans)) + '\n')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()

def main
  input = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0]
  q = input[1]
  r = input[2...(2 + n)]
  
  queries = []
  (0...q).each do |i|
    k = input[2 + n + 2 * i]
    t = input[2 + n + 2 * i + 1]
    queries << [k, t, i]
  end
  
  queries.sort_by! { |query| query[0] }
  
  ans = Array.new(q)
  max_len = n + 1
  tree = Array.new(max_len + 1, 2**31 - 1)
  
  def update(tree, idx, val)
    while idx < tree.length
      if val < tree[idx]
        tree[idx] = val
      else
        break
      end
      idx += idx & -idx
    end
  end
  
  def query(tree, val)
    low = 1
    high = tree.length - 1
    res = 0
    
    left = 1
    right = tree.length - 1
    while left <= right
      mid = (left + right) / 2
      
      min_val = 2**31 - 1
      curr = mid
      while curr > 0
        min_val = tree[curr] if tree[curr] < min_val
        curr -= curr & -curr
      end
      
      if min_val <= val
        res = mid
        left = mid + 1
      else
        right = mid - 1
      end
    end
    res
  end

  tails = Array.new(n + 1, 2**31 - 1)
  current_k = 0
  
  queries.each do |k, t, idx|
    while current_k < k
      val = r[current_k]
      
      left = 1
      right = n
      pos = n + 1
      
      low = 1
      high = n
      while low <= high
        mid = (low + high) / 2
        
        min_at_mid = 2**31 - 1
        curr = mid
        while curr > 0
          min_at_mid = tree[curr] if tree[curr] < min_at_mid
          curr -= curr & -curr
        end
        
        if min_at_mid >= val
          pos = mid
          high = mid - 1
        else
          low = mid + 1
        end
      end
      
      update(tree, pos, val)
      current_k += 1
    end
    
    ans[idx] = query(tree, t)
  end
  
  puts ans
end

    end

def find_min_palindrome_path(grid, n, start, target)
  if start == target
    return 0
  end
  
  queue = []
  visited = {}
  
  queue << [start, "", "", 0]
  visited[[start, "", ""]] = true
  
  while !queue.empty?
    node, left, right, hops = queue.shift
    
    n.times do |next_node|
      char = grid[node][next_node]
      next if char == '-'
      
      new_left = left
      new_right = right + char
      
      while new_left.length > 0 && new_right.length > 0 && new_left[-1] == new_right[0]
        new_left = new_left[0...-1]
        new_right = new_right[1..-1]
      end
      
      if next_node == target && new_left.empty? && new_right.empty?
        return hops + 1
      end
      
      state = [next_node, new_left, new_right]
      next if visited[state]
      
      if new_left.length + new_right.length <= 20
        visited[state] = true
        queue << [next_node, new_left, new_right, hops + 1]
      end
    end
  end
  
  -1
end

        if dist[i][j] == -1
          dist[i][j] = 1
          queue << [i, j]

      char_u = s[prev_u][u]

          if dist[prev_u][next_v] == -1
            dist[prev_u][next_v] = d + 2
            queue << [prev_u, next_v]
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

  n.times do |i|

      degrees = config[:degrees]
      
      valid = true
      has_hub = false
      
      nodes.each do |node|
        deg = degrees[node] || 0
        if deg != 1 && deg != 4
          valid = false
          break
        end
        has_hub = true if deg == 4
      end
      
      if valid && has_hub
        max_nodes = [max_nodes, nodes.size].max
      end
    end
  end
  
  puts max_nodes
end

def dfs(node, parent, adj, visited)
  visited[node] = true
  
  children = adj[node].select { |child| child != parent }
  
  if children.empty?
    return [{nodes: [node], degrees: {node => 0}}]
  end
  
  child_results = children.map { |child| dfs(child, node, adj, visited) }
  
  all_configs = []
  
  generate_combinations(child_results, 0, [], all_configs)
  
  results = []
  
  all_configs.each do |combo|
    nodes = [node]
    degrees = {}
    
    combo.each do |config|
      nodes.concat(config[:nodes])
      config[:degrees].each { |n, d| degrees[n] = d }
    end
    
    degrees[node] = combo.size
    
    combo.each do |config|
      child_node = config[:nodes][0]
      degrees[child_node] = (degrees[child_node] || 0) + 1
    end
    
    results << {nodes: nodes, degrees: degrees}
  end
  
  results
end

def generate_combinations(arrays, index, current, result)
  if index == arrays.size
    result << current.dup unless current.empty?
    return
  end
  
  generate_combinations(arrays, index + 1, current, result)
  
  arrays[index].each do |item|
    current << item
    generate_combinations(arrays, index + 1, current, result)
    current.pop
  end
end

    order << u

  dp = Array.new(n + 1, -1)
  max_total = -1

  order.reverse_each do |u|

        children_dp << dp[v] if dp[v] != -1
      end

def dijkstra(r, c, d, start_r, start_c, start_deck, end_r, end_c, end_deck)
  pq = [[0, start_r, start_c, start_deck]]
  visited = Set.new
  
  while !pq.empty?
    pq.sort_by! { |x| x[0] }
    cost, row, col, deck = pq.shift
    
    state = [row, col, deck]
    next if visited.include?(state)
    visited.add(state)
    
    if row == end_r && col == end_c && deck == end_deck
      return cost
    end
    
    max_deck = d[row][col]
    
    (1..max_deck).each do |new_deck|
      next if new_deck == deck
      new_cost = cost + (new_deck - deck).abs
      new_state = [row, col, new_deck]
      if !visited.include?(new_state)
        pq << [new_cost, row, col, new_deck]
      end
    end
    
    [[row-1, col], [row+1, col], [row, col-1], [row, col+1]].each do |nr, nc|
      if nr >= 0 && nr < r && nc >= 0 && nc < c
        if d[nr][nc] >= deck
          new_state = [nr, nc, deck]
          if !visited.include?(new_state)
            pq << [cost, nr, nc, deck]
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  -1
end

import heapq
from collections import defaultdict

def main():
    N, M, X = map(int, input().split())
    
    edges = []
    for _ in range(M):
        a, b = map(int, input().split())
        edges.append((a, b))
    
    graph_normal = defaultdict(list)
    graph_inverted = defaultdict(list)
    
    for a, b in edges:
        graph_normal[a].append(b)
        graph_inverted[b].append(a)
    
    INF = float('inf')
    dist = [[INF, INF] for _ in range(N + 1)]
    dist[1][0] = 0
    
    pq = [(0, 1, 0)]
    
    while pq:
        cost, node, parity = heapq.heappop(pq)
        
        if cost > dist[node][parity]:
            continue
        
        if node == N:
            continue
        
        if parity == 0:
            current_graph = graph_normal
        else:
            current_graph = graph_inverted
        
        for neighbor in current_graph[node]:
            new_cost = cost + 1
            if new_cost < dist[neighbor][parity]:
                dist[neighbor][parity] = new_cost
                heapq.heappush(pq, (new_cost, neighbor, parity))
        
        new_parity = 1 - parity
        new_cost = cost + X
        if new_cost < dist[node][new_parity]:
            dist[node][new_parity] = new_cost
            heapq.heappush(pq, (new_cost, node, new_parity))
    
    result = min(dist[N][0], dist[N][1])
    print(result)

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()

        return
    
    N = int(input_data[0])
    M = int(input_data[1])
    X = int(input_data[2])

    rev_adj = [[] for _ in range(N + 1)]

    for _ in range(M):
        u = int(input_data[idx])
        v = int(input_data[idx+1])
        adj[u].append(v)
        rev_adj[v].append(u)
        idx += 2
        
    dist = [float('inf')] * (2 * N + 1)
    dist[1] = 0
    pq = [(0, 1)]
    
    while pq:
        d, state = heapq.heappop(pq)
        
        if d > dist[state]:
            continue
            
        u = (state - 1) % N + 1
        is_rev = (state - 1)
        
        target_dist_flip = d + X
        other_state = ((1 - is_rev) * N) + u
        if dist[other_state] > target_dist_flip:
            dist[other_state] = target_dist_flip
            heapq.heappush(pq, (dist[other_state], other_state))
            
        current_adj = rev_adj if is_rev else adj
        for v in current_adj[u]:
            v_state = (is_rev * N) + v
            if dist[v_state] > d + 1:
                dist[v_state] = d + 1
                heapq.heappush(pq, (dist[v_state], v_state))
                
    ans = min(dist[N], dist[2 * N])
    print(ans)

  pq = []

  heapq_push(pq, [0, 0, 1])
  
  until pq.empty?
    d, state, u = heapq_pop(pq)
    
    next if d > dist[state][u]
    
    if u == n
      puts d
      return
    end
    
    adj[state][u].each do |v|
      if dist[state][v] > d + 1
        dist[state][v] = d + 1
        heapq_push(pq, [dist[state][v], state, v])
      end
    end
    
    next_state = 1 - state
    if dist[next_state][u] > d + x
      dist[next_state][u] = d + x
      heapq_push(pq, [dist[next_state][u], next_state, u])
    end

def heapq_push(heap, item)
  heap << item
  i = heap.length - 1
  while i > 0
    parent = (i - 1) / 2
    if heap[i][0] < heap[parent][0]
      heap[i], heap[parent] = heap[parent], heap[i]
      i = parent
    else
      break
    end
  end
end

def heapq_pop(heap)
  return nil if heap.empty?
  return heap.pop if heap.length == 1
  
  root = heap[0]
  heap[0] = heap.pop
  i = 0
  while true
    left = 2 * i + 1
    right = 2 * i + 2
    smallest = i
    
    if left < heap.length && heap[left][0] < heap[smallest][0]
      smallest = left
    end
    if right < heap.length && heap[right][0] < heap[smallest][0]
      smallest = right
    end
    
    if smallest != i
      heap[i], heap[smallest] = heap[smallest], heap[i]
      i = smallest
    else
      break
    end
  end
  root
end

  n, y = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  pairs = []
  n.times do
    p, s = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    pairs << [p, s]
  end
  
  max_t = pairs.map { |p, s| p + s }.max
  min_t = pairs.map { |p, s| [0, [p, s].max].max }.max
  
  best_cost = Float::INFINITY
  
  (min_t..max_t).each do |t|
    ranges = []
    valid = true
    
    pairs.each do |p, s|
      min_p = [0, t - s].max
      max_p = [t, p].min
      if min_p > max_p
        valid = false
        break
      end
      ranges << [min_p, max_p]
    end
    
    next unless valid
    
    dp = {}
    
    ranges[0][0].upto(ranges[0][1]) do |p0|
      cost = pairs[0][0] - p0 + pairs[0][1] - (t - p0)
      dp[p0] = cost
    end
    
    (1...n).each do |i|
      new_dp = {}
      min_pi, max_pi = ranges[i]
      
      min_pi.upto(max_pi) do |pi|
        cost_i = pairs[i][0] - pi + pairs[i][1] - (t - pi)
        best = Float::INFINITY
        
        dp.each do |prev_p, prev_cost|
          if (pi - prev_p).abs <= y
            best = [best, prev_cost].min
          end
        end
        
        if best < Float::INFINITY
          new_dp[pi] = best + cost_i
        end
      end
      
      dp = new_dp
      break if dp.empty?
    end
    
    if !dp.empty?
      best_cost = [best_cost, dp.values.min].min
    end
  end
  
  puts best_cost
end

    N = int(input_data[0])
    Y = int(input_data[1])
    
    P = []
    S = []
    idx = 2
    for _ in range(N):
        P.append(int(input_data[idx]))
        S.append(int(input_data[idx+1]))
        idx += 2
        
    L = [P[i] for i in range(N)]
    R = [P[i] + S[i] - 1 for i in range(N)]
    
    def solve(target_ranges, gap):
        left_heap = []
        right_heap = []
        
        l0, r0 = target_ranges[0]
        heapq.heappush(left_heap, -l0)
        heapq.heappush(right_heap, r0)
        
        ans = 0
        offset_l = 0
        offset_r = 0
        
        for i in range(1, N):
            offset_l -= gap
            offset_r += gap
            
            li, ri = target_ranges[i]
            
            opt_l = -left_heap[0] + offset_l
            opt_r = right_heap[0] + offset_r
            
            if li > opt_r:
                ans += li - opt_r
                heapq.heappush(left_heap, opt_r - offset_l)
                heapq.heappush(left_heap, li - offset_l)
                heapq.heappop(right_heap)
                heapq.heappush(right_heap, li - offset_r)
            elif ri < opt_l:
                ans += opt_l - ri
                heapq.heappush(right_heap, opt_l - offset_r)
                heapq.heappush(right_heap, ri - offset_r)
                heapq.heappop(left_heap)
                heapq.heappush(left_heap, ri - offset_l)
            else:
                heapq.heappush(left_heap, li - offset_l)
                heapq.heappush(right_heap, ri - offset_r)
                
        return ans

    m_vals = []
    for i in range(N):
        m_vals.append(P[i] + S[i])
    
    m_vals.sort()
    T = m_vals[N
    
    def calculate_cost(T_val):
        ranges = []
        base_cost = 0
        for i in range(N):
            low = max(1, T_val - S[i])
            high = min(P[i], T_val - 1)
            if low > high:
                base_cost += (low - P[i]) + (low - (T_val - S[i]))
                ranges.append((low, low))
            else:
                ranges.append((low, high))
        return base_cost + solve(ranges, Y)

    res = calculate_cost(T)
    
    low_T = m_vals[0]
    high_T = m_vals[-1]
    
    while high_T - low_T > 2:
        m1 = low_T + (high_T - low_T)
        m2 = high_T - (high_T - low_T)
        if calculate_cost(m1) < calculate_cost(m2):
            high_T = m2
        else:
            low_T = m1
            
    for t in range(low_T, high_T + 1):
        res = min(res, calculate_cost(t))
        
    print(res)

  m.times do
    p, q, e = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    graph[p] << [q, e]
    graph[q] << [p, e]
  end
  
  min_xor = Float::INFINITY
  
  queue = [[1, 0, [1]]]
  
  while !queue.empty?
    node, xor_val, visited = queue.shift
    
    if node == n
      min_xor = [min_xor, xor_val].min
      next
    end
    
    graph[node].each do |neighbor, edge_val|
      if !visited.include?(neighbor)
        new_visited = visited + [neighbor]
        new_xor = xor_val ^ edge_val
        queue << [neighbor, new_xor, new_visited]
      end
    end
  end
  
  puts min_xor
end

def solve()
  input_data = STDIN.read.split
  return if input_data.empty?
  
  n = input_data[0].to_i
  m = input_data[1].to_i
  
  adj = Array.new(n + 1) { [] }
  idx = 2
  m.times do
    u = input_data[idx].to_i
    v = input_data[idx+1].to_i
    w = input_data[idx+2].to_i
    adj[u] << [v, w]
    adj[v] << [u, w]
    idx += 3
  end

  min_xor = Float::INFINITY
  visited = Array.new(n + 1, false)

  dfs = lambda do |u, current_xor|
    if u == n
      min_xor = current_xor if current_xor < min_xor
      return
    end

    visited[u] = true
    adj[u].each do |v, w|
      unless visited[v]
        dfs.call(v, current_xor ^ w)
      end
    end
    visited[u] = false
  end

  dfs.call(1, 0)
  puts min_xor
end

def main()
  p, q = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  
  edges = []
  q.times do
    u, v, w = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    edges << [u, v, w]
  end
  
  adj = Array.new(p + 1) { [] }
  edges.each do |u, v, w|
    adj[u] << [v, w]
    adj[v] << [u, w]
  end
  
  visited = Array.new(p + 1, false)
  result = Array.new(p + 1, 0)
  
  (1..p).each do |start|
    next if visited[start]
    
    component = []
    queue = [start]
    visited[start] = true
    values = {}
    values[start] = 0
    component << start
    valid = true
    
    while !queue.empty? && valid
      u = queue.shift
      adj[u].each do |v, w|
        expected = values[u] ^ w
        if visited[v]
          if values[v] != expected
            valid = false
            break
          end
        else
          visited[v] = true
          values[v] = expected
          component << v
          queue << v
        end
      end
    end
    
    if !valid
      puts "-1"
      return
    end
    
    max_bit = 0
    component.each do |node|
      val = values[node]
      if val > 0
        bit_length = val.bit_length
        max_bit = [max_bit, bit_length].max
      end
    end
    
    best_sum = nil
    best_xor = 0
    
    if max_bit == 0
      best_xor = 0
    else
      (0..(1 << max_bit) - 1).each do |base_xor|
        sum = 0
        component.each do |node|
          sum += values[node] ^ base_xor
        end
        if best_sum.nil? || sum < best_sum
          best_sum = sum
          best_xor = base_xor
        end
      end
    end
    
    component.each do |node|
      result[node] = values[node] ^ best_xor
    end
  end
  
  puts result[1..p].join(" ")
end

  p_count = input[0].to_i
  q_count = input[1].to_i
  
  adj = Array.new(p_count + 1) { [] }
  q_count.times do |i|
    u = input[2 + 3 * i].to_i
    v = input[2 + 3 * i + 1].to_i
    w = input[2 + 3 * i + 2].to_i
    adj[u] << [v, w]
    adj[v] << [u, w]
  end

  visited_val = Array.new(p_count + 1, nil)
  components = []

  (1..p_count).each do |i|
    next unless visited_val[i].nil?
    
    comp = []
    stack = [[i, 0]]
    visited_val[i] = 0
    
    while !stack.empty?
      u, val = stack.pop
      comp << [u, val]
      
      adj[u].each do |v, w|
        if visited_val[v].nil?
          visited_val[v] = val ^ w
          stack << [v, visited_val[v]]
        else
          if (visited_val[v] ^ val) != w
            puts -1
            return
          end
        end
      end
    end
    components << comp
  end

  final_s = Array.new(p_count + 1)
  
  components.each do |comp|
    best_x = 0
    30.step(0, -1).each do |bit|
      count1 = 0
      comp.each do |node, val|
        count1 += 1 if (val >> bit) & 1 == 1
      end
      
      count0 = comp.size - count1
      
      if count1 > count0
        best_x |= (1 << bit)
      end
    end
    
    comp.each do |node, val|
      final_s[node] = val ^ best_x
    end
  end

  puts final_s[1..p_count].join(" ")
end

def merge_and_count(arr, temp, left, mid, right):
    i = left
    j = mid + 1
    k = left
    inv_count = 0
    
    while i <= mid and j <= right:
        if arr[i] <= arr[j]:
            temp[k] = arr[i]
            i += 1
        else:
            temp[k] = arr[j]
            inv_count += (mid - i + 1)
            j += 1
        k += 1
    
    while i <= mid:
        temp[k] = arr[i]
        i += 1
        k += 1
    
    while j <= right:
        temp[k] = arr[j]
        j += 1
        k += 1
    
    for i in range(left, right + 1):
        arr[i] = temp[i]
    
    return inv_count

def merge_sort_and_count(arr, temp, left, right):
    inv_count = 0
    if left < right:
        mid = (left + right)
        inv_count += merge_sort_and_count(arr, temp, left, mid)
        inv_count += merge_sort_and_count(arr, temp, mid + 1, right)
        inv_count += merge_and_count(arr, temp, left, mid, right)
    return inv_count

def count_inversions(arr):
    n = len(arr)
    if n <= 1:
        return 0
    temp = [0] * n
    arr_copy = arr[:]
    return merge_sort_and_count(arr_copy, temp, 0, n - 1)

def merge_and_count(arr)
  return [arr, 0] if arr.length <= 1
  
  mid = arr.length / 2
  left, left_inv = merge_and_count(arr[0...mid])
  right, right_inv = merge_and_count(arr[mid..-1])
  
  merged = []
  inversions = left_inv + right_inv
  i = 0
  j = 0
  
  while i < left.length && j < right.length
    if left[i] <= right[j]
      merged << left[i]
      i += 1
    else
      merged << right[j]
      inversions += left.length - i
      j += 1
    end
  end
  
  merged.concat(left[i..-1]) if i < left.length
  merged.concat(right[j..-1]) if j < right.length
  
  [merged, inversions]
end

def count_inversions(arr)
  _, inversions = merge_and_count(arr)
  inversions
end

        i += 1
        while i <= H:
            bit[i] += delta
            i += i & (-i)
    
    def query(i):
        i += 1
        s = 0
        while i > 0:
            s += bit[i]
            i -= i & (-i)
        return s

    initial_inversions = 0
    for i in range(L - 1, -1, -1):
        initial_inversions += query(D[i] - 1)
        update(D[i], 1)

    count = [0] * H
    for x in D:
        count[x] += 1
    
    prefix_count = [0] * (H + 1)
    for i in range(H):
        prefix_count[i+1] = prefix_count[i] + count[i]
    
    diff = [0] * (H + 1)
    diff[0] = initial_inversions
    
    pos_list = [[] for _ in range(H)]
    for i, val in enumerate(D):
        pos_list[val].append(i)
        
    for v in range(H):
        t_wrap = (H - v) % H
        if t_wrap == 0:
            continue
        
        num_v = len(pos_list[v])
        smaller_than_v = prefix_count[v]
        larger_than_v = L - prefix_count[v+1]
        
        sum_idx = sum(pos_list[v])
        
        gain = sum_idx - (num_v * (num_v - 1))
        loss = (num_v * (L - 1) - sum_idx) - (num_v * (num_v - 1))
        
        delta = larger_than_v * num_v - smaller_than_v * num_v + gain - loss
        diff[t_wrap] += delta

    current = diff[0]
    results = []
    for t in range(H):
        if t > 0:
            current += diff[t]
        results.append(str(current))
    
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(results) + '\n')

    main()

def main
  input = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  l = input[0]
  h = input[1]
  d = input[2...2+l]

  bit = Array.new(h + 1, 0)
  
  initial_disorder = 0
  d.reverse_each do |val|
    idx = val + 1
    s = 0
    x = idx - 1
    while x > 0
      s += bit[x]
      x -= x & -x
    end
    initial_disorder += s
    
    x = idx
    while x <= h
      bit[x] += 1
      x += x & -x
    end
  end

  counts = Hash.new(0)
  d.each { |val| counts[val] += 1 }

  diff = Array.new(h + 1, 0)
  current_disorder = initial_disorder
  
  prefix_counts = Array.new(h + 1, 0)
  d.each { |val| prefix_counts[val + 1] += 1 }
  (1..h).each { |i| prefix_counts[i] += prefix_counts[i-1] }

  results = []
  results << current_disorder

  d_counts = Array.new(h, 0)
  d.each { |val| d_counts[val] += 1 }

  (1...h).each do |t|
    v = h - t
    before_v = prefix_counts[v]
    at_v = d_counts[v]
    after_v = l - before_v - at_v
    
    current_disorder -= before_v
    current_disorder += after_v
    results << current_disorder
  end

  puts results
end

def main
  input = $stdin.read.split
  return if input.empty?

  l = input[0].to_i
  m = input[1].to_i
  rows = input[2..-1]

  counts = Hash.new(0)
  rows.each do |row|
    counts[row.to_i(2)] += 1
  end

  min_total = l * m

  (0...(1 << m)).each do |beta_mask|
    current_total = 0
    counts.each do |row_val, count|
      transformed = row_val ^ beta_mask
      ones = 0
      temp = transformed
      while temp > 0
        ones += 1 if temp & 1 == 1
        temp >>= 1
      end
      
      row_ones = ones
      row_zeros = m - ones
      
      current_total += [row_ones, row_zeros].min * count
    end
    
    min_total = current_total if current_total < min_total
  end

  puts min_total
end

  dp[0][0] = 0
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    (0...2).each do |state|
      next if dp[i][state] == Float::INFINITY
      
      expected = (state == 0 ? 'X' : 'Y')
      
      if chars[i] == expected
        new_state = 1 - state
        if dp[i + 1][new_state] > dp[i][state]
          dp[i + 1][new_state] = dp[i][state]
        end
      else
        new_state = 1 - state
        if dp[i][new_state] > dp[i][state] + 1
          dp[i][new_state] = dp[i][state] + 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  ans = dp[n][0]
  if dp[n][1] + 1 < ans
    ans = dp[n][1] + 1
  end
  
  puts ans
end

  p = gets.to_i
  
  divisors = []
  i = 1
  while i * i <= p
    if p % i == 0
      divisors << i
      divisors << p / i if i * i != p
    end
    i += 1
  end
  
  divisors.each do |d|
    next if p % d != 0
    q = p / d
    
    discriminant = 12 * q - 3 * d * d
    next if discriminant < 0
    
    sqrt_disc = Math.sqrt(discriminant).round
    next if sqrt_disc * sqrt_disc != discriminant
    
    numerator = -3 * d + sqrt_disc
    next if numerator < 0
    next if numerator % 6 != 0
    
    b = numerator / 6
    next if b <= 0
    
    a = b + d
    
    if a * a * a - b * b * b == p
      puts "#{a} #{b}"
      return
    end
  end
  
  puts "-1"
end

def solve()
  input = gets
  return if input.nil?
  p = input.to_i

  divisors = []
  i = 1
  while i * i <= p
    if p % i == 0
      divisors << i
      divisors << p / i if i * i != p
    end
    i += 1
  end
  divisors.sort!

  divisors.each do |d|
    next if (p / d - d * d) % (3 * d) != 0
    inner = (p / d - d * d) / (3 * d)
    next if inner <= 0
    
    b_val = Math.sqrt(inner).to_i
    found_b = -1
    [b_val, b_val + 1].each do |candidate|
      if candidate * candidate == inner
        found_b = candidate
        break
      end
    end

    if found_b > 0
      a = found_b + d
      puts "#{a} #{found_b}"
      return
    end
  end

  puts "-1"
end

def main()
  n, k = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  
  total = n * k
  
  if k == 1
    puts "Yes"
    return
  end
  
  adj = Array.new(total + 1) { [] }
  
  (total - 1).times do
    a, b = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    adj[a] << b
    adj[b] << a
  end
  
  complete_paths = [0]
  
  def dfs(node, parent, adj, k, complete_paths)
    children_paths = []
    
    adj[node].each do |child|
      next if child == parent
      path_len = dfs(child, node, adj, k, complete_paths)
      children_paths << path_len if path_len > 0
    end
    
    children_paths.sort!
    
    while children_paths.size >= 2
      last = children_paths.pop
      second_last = children_paths.pop
      
      combined = last + second_last + 1
      
      if combined == k
        complete_paths[0] += 1
      elsif combined < k
        children_paths << combined
        children_paths.sort!
      else
        children_paths << second_last
        children_paths << last
        children_paths.sort!
        break
      end
    end
    
    if children_paths.empty?
      return 1
    elsif children_paths.size == 1
      path_len = children_paths[0]
      combined = path_len + 1
      
      if combined == k
        complete_paths[0] += 1
        return 0
      else
        return combined
      end
    else
      return 0
    end
  end
  
  remaining = dfs(1, -1, adj, k, complete_paths)
  
  if complete_paths[0] == n && remaining == 0
    puts "Yes"
  else
    puts "No"
  end
end

  input = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0]
  k = input[1]
  nk = n * k
  
  if k == 1
    puts "Yes"
    return
  end
  
  adj = Array.new(nk + 1) { [] }
  (nk - 1).times do |i|
    u = input[2 + 2 * i]
    v = input[3 + 2 * i]
    adj[u] << v
    adj[v] << u
  end
  
  parent = Array.new(nk + 1, 0)
  order = []
  stack = [1]
  parent[1] = -1
  while !stack.empty?
    u = stack.pop
    order << u
    adj[u].each do |v|
      if parent[v] == 0
        parent[v] = u
        stack << v
      end
    end
  end
  
  dp = Array.new(nk + 1, 0)
  possible = true
  
  order.reverse_each do |u|
    count_one = 0
    sum_others = 0
    
    adj[u].each do |v|
      next if v == parent[u]
      
      if dp[v] == k
        next
      elsif dp[v] == 1
        count_one += 1
      else
        possible = false
        break
      end
    end
    
    break unless possible
    
    if count_one == 0
      dp[u] = 1
    elsif count_one == 1
      dp[u] = 2
    elsif count_one == 2
      dp[u] = k
    else
      possible = false
      break
    end
  end






  
  size = Array.new(nk + 1, 1)
  ans = true
  
  order.reverse_each do |u|
    curr_size = 1
    adj[u].each do |v|
      next if v == parent[u]
      if size[v] % k != 0
        curr_size += size[v]
      end
    end
    size[u] = curr_size
    if size[u] > k
      ans = false
      break
    end
  end
  
  if ans && size[1] % k == 0
    puts "Yes"
  else
    puts "No"
  end
end

from collections import deque
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    M = int(data[1])
    K = int(data[2])
    
    edges = []
    for i in range(M):
        a = int(data[3 + 2*i])
        b = int(data[3 + 2*i + 1])
        edges.append((a, b))
    
    def can_achieve(target):
        graph = [[] for _ in range(N + 1)]
        for idx, (a, b) in enumerate(edges):
            graph[a].append((b, idx))
        
        INF = float('inf')
        dist = [[INF] * (K + 1) for _ in range(N + 1)]
        dist[1][0] = 0
        
        from heapq import heappush, heappop
        pq = [(0, 1, 0)]
        
        while pq:
            cost, node, tolls = heappop(pq)
            
            if cost > dist[node][tolls]:
                continue
            
            for neighbor, edge_idx in graph[node]:
                new_cost_no_toll = cost
                if tolls < K and new_cost_no_toll < dist[neighbor][tolls + 1]:
                    dist[neighbor][tolls + 1] = new_cost_no_toll
                    heappush(pq, (new_cost_no_toll, neighbor, tolls + 1))
                
                new_cost_toll = cost + 1
                if new_cost_toll < dist[neighbor][tolls]:
                    dist[neighbor][tolls] = new_cost_toll
                    heappush(pq, (new_cost_toll, neighbor, tolls))
        
        min_cost = min(dist[N])
        return min_cost >= target
    
    left, right = 0, K
    answer = 0
    
    while left <= right:
        mid = (left + right)
        if can_achieve(mid):
            answer = mid
            left = mid + 1
        else:
            right = mid - 1
    
    print(answer)

      next if cost > dist[node]
      
      roads.each_with_index do |(a, b), idx|
        if a == node
          new_cost = cost + (tolled_set.include?(idx) ? 1 : 0)
          if new_cost < dist[b]
            dist[b] = new_cost
            queue << [b, new_cost]
          end
        end
      end
    end
    
    dist[n]
  end
  
  def combinations(arr, k)
    return [[]] if k == 0
    return [] if arr.empty?
    
    result = []
    (0..arr.length - k).each do |i|
      combinations(arr[i+1..-1], k - 1).each do |combo|
        result << [arr[i]] + combo
      end
    end
    result
  end
  
  road_indices = (0...m).to_a
  
  combinations(road_indices, k).each do |tolled_indices|
    tolled_set = Set.new(tolled_indices)
    cost = shortest_path(n, roads, tolled_set)
    max_cost = [max_cost, cost].max if cost != Float::INFINITY
  end
  
  puts max_cost
end

def solve
  line = gets.split
  return if line.nil?
  n, m, k = line.map(&:to_i)
  edges = []
  m.times do
    edges << gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  end

  low = 0
  high = k
  ans = 0

  while low <= high
    mid = (low + high) / 2
    if check(n, m, k, edges, mid)
      ans = mid
      low = mid + 1
    else
      high = mid - 1
    end
  end
  puts ans
end

def check(n, m, k, edges, target)
  dp = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(target + 1, Float::INFINITY) }
  dp[1][0] = 0

  (n * (target + 1)).times do
    updated = false
    edges.each do |u, v|
      (0..target).each do |c|
        next if dp[u][c] == Float::INFINITY
        
        cost_with_toll = dp[u][c] + 1
        if c + 1 <= target && dp[v][c + 1] > cost_with_toll
          dp[v][c + 1] = cost_with_toll
          updated = true
        end
        
        cost_without_toll = dp[u][c]
        if dp[v][c] > cost_without_toll
          dp[v][c] = cost_without_toll
          updated = true
        end
      end
    end
    break unless updated
  end

  dp[n][target] <= k
end

def main
  solve
end

    signals = new_signals

    needed_c = target_c + dc
    needed_key = "#{needed_r},#{needed_c}"
    
    if visited.key?(needed_key)
      results << '1'
    else
      results << '0'
    end
  end
  
  puts results

def compute_pi(s)
  n = s.length
  pi = Array.new(n, 0)
  (1...n).each do |i|
    j = pi[i - 1]
    while j > 0 && s[i] != s[j]
      j = pi[j - 1]
    end
    if s[i] == s[j]
      j += 1
    end
    pi[i] = j
  end
  pi
end

  prefix = prefix.strip
  return if prefix.empty?

  reversed = prefix.reverse
  combined = reversed + "#" + prefix
  pi = compute_pi(combined)
  
  overlap = pi.last
  suffix = reversed[0...reversed.length - overlap]
  
  puts prefix + suffix
end

    adj[b] << a
  end

  total_moves = 0
  
  (1..n).each do |start|
    next if color[start] != -1
    
    count = [0, 0]
    queue = [start]
    color[start] = 0
    count[0] = 1
    
    while !queue.empty?
      node = queue.shift
      adj[node].each do |neighbor|
        if color[neighbor] == -1
          color[neighbor] = 1 - color[node]
          count[color[neighbor]] += 1
          queue << neighbor
        end
      end
    end
    
    total_moves += count[0] * count[1]
  end
  
  total_moves -= m
  
  if total_moves % 2 == 1
    puts "Evelyn"
  else
    puts "Marcus"
  end

def main
  input = STDIN.read.split
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0].to_i
  m = input[1].to_i
  
  adj = Array.new(n + 1) { [] }
  m.times do |i|
    u = input[2 + 2 * i].to_i
    v = input[2 + 2 * i + 1].to_i
    adj[u] << v
    adj[v] << u
  end

  color = Array.new(n + 1, -1)
  total_moves = 0
  
  (1..n).each do |i|
    next if color[i] != -1
    
    stack = [[i, 0]]
    color[i] = 0
    nodes = []
    
    while !stack.empty?
      u, c = stack.pop
      nodes << u
      adj[u].each do |v|
        if color[v] == -1
          color[v] = 1 - c
          stack << [v, 1 - c]
        end
      end
    end
    
    count0 = 0
    count1 = 0
    nodes.each do |u|
      if color[u] == 0
        count0 += 1
      else
        count1 += 1
      end
    end
    
    total_moves += count0 * count1
  end
  
  remaining_moves = total_moves - m
  
  if remaining_moves % 2 == 1
    puts "Evelyn"
  else
    puts "Marcus"
  end
end

def main():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    n = int(input_data[0])
    m = int(input_data[1])
    
    if m == 0:
        print(0)
        return
    
    parent = list(range(n + 1))
    
    def find(i):
        if parent[i] == i:
            return i
        parent[i] = find(parent[i])
        return parent[i]
    
    def union(i, j):
        root_i = find(i)
        root_j = find(j)
        if root_i != root_j:
            parent[root_i] = root_j
            return True
        return False

    edges_count = 0
    idx = 2
    for _ in range(m):
        u = int(input_data[idx])
        v = int(input_data[idx+1])
        idx += 2
        if union(u, v):
            edges_count += 1
            
    print(m - edges_count)

class DSU
  def initialize(n)
    @parent = Array.new(n + 1) { |i| i }
  end

  def find(i)
    if @parent[i] == i
      return i
    else
      @parent[i] = find(@parent[i])
      return @parent[i]
    end
  end

  def unite(i, j)
    root_i = find(i)
    root_j = find(j)
    if root_i != root_j
      @parent[root_i] = root_j
      return true
    end
    false
  end
end

def main
  input = STDIN.read.split
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0].to_i
  m = input[1].to_i
  
  dsu = DSU.new(n)
  removed_count = 0
  
  idx = 2
  m.times do
    u = input[idx].to_i
    v = input[idx + 1].to_i
    idx += 2
    
    unless dsu.unite(u, v)
      removed_count += 1
    end
  end
  
  puts removed_count
end

        valid = false
        
        [[0, 1], [0, 2], [0, 3]].each do |i, j|
          next if all_pos[j] - all_pos[i] != 1

          (0..3).each do |k|

              valid = true
              break
            end
          end
        end
        
        count += 1 if valid
      end
    end

import sys

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    idx = 0
    T_str = input_data[idx]
    idx += 1
    T = int(T_str)
    
    results = []
    for _ in range(T):
        N = int(input_data[idx])
        idx += 1
        B = input_data[idx:idx + 2 * N]
        idx += 2 * N
        
        pos = [[] for _ in range(N + 1)]
        for i, val in enumerate(B):
            pos[int(val)].append(i)
        
        active_species = []
        for i in range(1, N + 1):
            if pos[i][1] - pos[i][0] > 1:
                active_species.append(i)
        
        if not active_species:
            results.append(0)
            continue
            
        intervals = []
        for s in active_species:
            intervals.append((pos[s][0], pos[s][1]))
        
        n_active = len(intervals)
        if n_active < 2:
            results.append(0)
            continue

        events = []
        for i in range(n_active):
            l, r = intervals[i]
            events.append((l, 1, i))
            events.append((r, -1, i))
        
        events.sort()
        
        bit = [0] * (2 * N + 1)
        
        def update(idx, val):
            idx += 1
            while idx <= 2 * N:
                bit[idx] += val
                idx += idx & (-idx)
        
        def query(idx):
            idx += 1
            s = 0
            while idx > 0:
                s += bit[idx]
                idx -= idx & (-idx)
            return s

        intersections = 0
        for _, type, i in events:
            l, r = intervals[i]
            if type == 1:
                intersections += query(r) - query(l)
                update(r, 1)
            else:
                update(r, -1)
        
        total_pairs = (n_active * (n_active - 1))
        results.append(total_pairs - intersections)

    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(map(str, results)) + '\n')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    solve()

def main
  input = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  
  idx = 0
  t = input[idx]
  idx += 1
  
  results = []
  
  t.times do
    n = input[idx]
    idx += 1
    b = input[idx, 2 * n]
    idx += 2 * n
    
    pos = Array.new(n + 1) { [] }
    b.each_with_index do |species, i|
      pos[species] << i
    end
    
    non_adj = []
    (1..n).each do |i|
      if pos[i][1] - pos[i][0] > 1
        non_adj << i
      end
    end
    
    if non_adj.size < 2
      results << 0
      next
    end
    
    events = []
    non_adj.each do |species|
      events << [pos[species][0], pos[species][1]]
    end
    
    m = events.size
    intersect_count = 0
    
    sorted_events = events.sort_by { |e| e[0] }
    
    bit = Array.new(2 * n + 1, 0)
    
    update = lambda do |i, val|
      i += 1
      while i <= 2 * n
        bit[i] += val
        i += i & (-i)
      end
    end
    
    query = lambda do |i|
      i += 1
      s = 0
      while i > 0
        s += bit[i]
        i -= i & (-i)
      end
      s
    end
    
    sorted_events.each do |l, r|
      intersect_count += query(r) - query(l)
      update.call(r, 1)
    end
    
    total_pairs = m * (m - 1) / 2
    results << (total_pairs - intersect_count)
  end
  
  puts results
end

  l.times do |i|
    pc = p[i]
    qc = q[i]
    
    if must_map_to.key?(pc)
      if must_map_to[pc] != qc
        puts -1
        return

      must_map_to[pc] = qc
    end

  current = {}
  ('a'..'z').each do |c|
    current[c] = c
  end
  
  operations = 0
  
  changed = true
  while changed
    changed = false
    
    must_map_to.each do |src, dst|
      if current[src] != dst
        actual_src = current[src]
        
        ('a'..'z').each do |c|
          if current[c] == actual_src
            current[c] = dst
          end
        end
        
        operations += 1
        changed = true
        break
      end
    end
  end
  
  all_match = true
  must_map_to.each do |src, dst|
    if current[src] != dst
      all_match = false
      break
    end
  end
  
  if all_match
    puts operations
  else
    puts -1
  end

def main
  l = gets.strip.to_i
  p = gets.strip
  q = gets.strip

  mapping = {}
  0.upto(l - 1) do |i|
    char_p = p[i]
    char_q = q[i]
    if mapping.key?(char_p)
      if mapping[char_p] != char_q
        puts -1
        return
      end
    else
      mapping[char_p] = char_q
    end
  end

  adj = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
  nodes = Set.new
  mapping.each do |u, v|
    if u != v
      adj[u] << v
      nodes.add(u)
      nodes.add(v)
    end
  end

  visited = {}
  total_operations = 0

  nodes.each do |start_node|
    next if visited[start_node]

    component_nodes = []
    stack = [start_node]
    visited[start_node] = true

    while !stack.empty?
      u = stack.pop
      component_nodes << u
      
      adj[u].each do |v|
        unless visited[v]
          visited[v] = true
          stack.push(v)
        end
      end
      
      mapping.each do |k, v|
        if v == u && !visited[k]
          visited[k] = true
          stack.push(k)
        end
      end
    end

    edges = 0
    out_degree = Hash.new(0)
    component_nodes.each do |u|
      if mapping.key?(u) && mapping[u] != u
        edges += 1
        out_degree[u] += 1
      end
    end

    has_cycle = false
    component_nodes.each do |u|
      curr = u
      path = {}
      step = 0
      while mapping.key?(curr) && mapping[curr] != curr && !path.key?(curr)
        path[curr] = step
        curr = mapping[curr]
        step += 1
      end
      
      if path.key?(curr)
        has_cycle = true
        break
      end
    end

    if has_cycle
      total_operations += edges + 1
    else
      total_operations += edges
    end
  end

  puts total_operations
end

def main
  input = $stdin.read.split.map(&:to_i)
  return if input.empty?
  
  n = input[0]
  k = input[1]
  s = input[2..-1]
  
  p = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  (0...n).each do |i|
    p[i + 1] = (p[i] + s[i]) % MOD
  end
  
  comb = Array.new(k + 1) { Array.new(k + 1, 0) }
  (0..k).each do |i|
    comb[i][0] = 1
    (1..i).each do |j|
      comb[i][j] = (comb[i - 1][j - 1] + comb[i - 1][j]) % MOD
    end
  end
  
  sum_p = Array.new(k + 1, 0)
  total_sum = 0
  
  (0..n).each do |r|
    current_p = p[r]
    powers = Array.new(k + 1)
    powers[0] = 1
    (1..k).each do |j|
      powers[j] = (powers[j - 1] * current_p) % MOD
    end
    
    term = 0
    (0..k).each do |j|
      val = (comb[k][j] * powers[k - j]) % MOD
      val = (val * sum_p[j]) % MOD
      if j % 2 == 1
        term = (term - val + MOD) % MOD
      else
        term = (term + val) % MOD
      end
    end
    
    total_sum = (total_sum + term) % MOD
    
    (0..k).each do |j|
      sum_p[j] = (sum_p[j] + powers[j]) % MOD
    end
  end
  
  puts total_sum
end

def main()
  h, w = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  grid = []
  h.times do
    grid << gets.chomp
  end
  a, b, c, d = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  a -= 1
  b -= 1
  c -= 1
  d -= 1
  
  queue = [[a, b, 0]]
  visited = {}
  grid_state = grid.map { |row| row.chars }
  
  min_bashes = Float::INFINITY
  state_queue = [[a, b, 0, grid_state.map(&:dup)]]
  visited_states = Set.new
  visited_states.add([a, b, grid_state.map(&:join).join])
  
  while !state_queue.empty?
    row, col, bashes, current_grid = state_queue.shift
    
    if row == c && col == d
      min_bashes = [min_bashes, bashes].min
      next
    end
    
    if bashes >= min_bashes
      next
    end
    
    [[0, 1], [0, -1], [1, 0], [-1, 0]].each do |dr, dc|
      nr, nc = row + dr, col + dc
      if nr >= 0 && nr < h && nc >= 0 && nc < w && current_grid[nr][nc] == '.'
        state_key = [nr, nc, current_grid.map(&:join).join]
        unless visited_states.include?(state_key)
          visited_states.add(state_key)
          state_queue.push([nr, nc, bashes, current_grid.map(&:dup)])
        end
      end
    end
    
    [[0, 1], [0, -1], [1, 0], [-1, 0]].each do |dr, dc|
      new_grid = current_grid.map(&:dup)
      (1..2).each do |step|
        br, bc = row + dr * step, col + dc * step
        if br >= 0 && br < h && bc >= 0 && bc < w
          new_grid[br][bc] = '.'
        end
      end
      state_key = [row, col, new_grid.map(&:join).join]
      unless visited_states.include?(state_key)
        visited_states.add(state_key)
        state_queue.push([row, col, bashes + 1, new_grid])
      end
    end
  end
  
  puts min_bashes
end

import 'set'

def main
  h, w = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
  r1, c1 = gets.split.map(&:to_i).map { |x| x - 1 }
  r2, c2 = gets.split.map(&:to_i).map { |x| x - 1 }
  grid = Array.new(h) { gets.chomp }

  dist = Array.new(h) { Array.new(w, Float::INFINITY) }
  dist[r1][c1] = 0
  deque = [[r1, c1]]

  dr = [0, 0, 1, -1]
  dc = [1, -1, 0, 0]

  while !deque.empty?
    r, c = deque.shift
    d = dist[r][c]

    if r == r2 && c == c2
      puts d
      return
    end

    4.times do |i|
      nr, nc = r + dr[i], c + dc[i]
      if nr >= 0 && nr < h && nc >= 0 && nc < w && grid[nr][nc] == '.'
        if dist[nr][nc] > d
          dist[nr][nc] = d
          deque.unshift([nr, nc])
        end
      end
    end

    (-2..2).each do |dr_off|
      (-2..2).each do |dc_off|
        nr, nc = r + dr_off, c + dc_off
        if nr >= 0 && nr < h && nc >= 0 && nc < w
          if dist[nr][nc] > d + 1
            dist[nr][nc] = d + 1
            deque.push([nr, nc])
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

  puts dist[r2][c2]
end

def sieve(n)
  is_prime = Array.new(n + 1, true)
  is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(n).to_i).each do |i|
    if is_prime[i]
      (i*i..n).step(i) { |j| is_prime[j] = false }
    end
  end
  (2..n).select { |i| is_prime[i] }
end

def generate_medallions(limit)
  primes = sieve(1000000)
  medallions = []
  
  primes.each_with_index do |p, i|
    p2 = p * p
    break if p2 * p2 * 4 > limit
    
    power_p = p2
    while power_p <= limit / 4
      primes[(i+1)..-1].each do |q|
        q2 = q * q
        break if power_p * q2 > limit
        
        power_q = q2
        while power_p * power_q <= limit
          medallions << power_p * power_q
          power_q *= q2
        end
      end
      power_p *= p2
    end
  end
  
  medallions.sort
end

  is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false
  (2..1000).each do |i|
    if is_prime[i]
      (i*i..1_000_000).step(i) { |j| is_prime[j] = false }
    end
  end
  (2..1_000_000).each { |i| primes << i if is_prime[i] }

  results = queries.map do |b|
    max_m = 0
    limit_sqrt = Math.sqrt(b).to_i
    
    primes.each do |p|
      p2 = p * p
      break if p2 * (primes[0]**2) > b
      
      remaining = b / p2
      idx = (0...primes.size).bsearch { |i| primes[i]**2 > remaining } || primes.size
      idx -= 1
      
      while idx >= 0
        q_val = primes[idx]
        if q_val == p
          idx -= 1
          next
        end
        
        q2 = q_val * q_val
        current_m = 0
        
        temp_p = p2
        while temp_p <= b
          temp_q = q2
          while temp_q <= b / temp_p
            val = temp_p * temp_q
            current_m = val if val > current_m
            break if b / q2 < temp_q
            temp_q *= q2
          end
          break if b / p2 < temp_p
          temp_p *= p2
        end
        
        max_m = current_m if current_m > max_m
        break if current_m > 0
        idx -= 1
      end
    end
    max_m
  end

  puts results
end

      idx -= 1

            cur_q *= q2

def duo_value(dev1, dev2)
  [dev1[0] + dev2[0], dev1[1] + dev2[1], dev1[2] + dev2[2]].max
end

def solve_small(devices, k)
  n = devices.size
  memo = {}
  
  def dp(devices, mask, pairs_left, memo)
    return 0 if pairs_left == 0
    
    key = [mask, pairs_left]
    return memo[key] if memo.has_key?(key)
    
    best = -1
    
    first = -1
    devices.size.times do |i|
      if (mask & (1 << i)) == 0
        first = i
        break
      end
    end
    
    return 0 if first == -1
    
    ((first + 1)...devices.size).each do |j|
      if (mask & (1 << j)) == 0
        new_mask = mask | (1 << first) | (1 << j)
        value = duo_value(devices[first], devices[j])
        rest = dp(devices, new_mask, pairs_left - 1, memo)
        best = [best, value + rest].max
      end
    end
    
    memo[key] = best
    best
  end
  
  dp(devices, 0, k, memo)
end

def solve_greedy(devices, k)
  n = devices.size
  used = Array.new(n, false)
  total = 0
  
  k.times do
    best_value = -1
    best_i = -1
    best_j = -1
    
    n.times do |i|
      next if used[i]
      (i + 1).upto(n - 1) do |j|
        next if used[j]
        value = duo_value(devices[i], devices[j])
        if value > best_value
          best_value = value
          best_i = i
          best_j = j
        end
      end
    end
    
    used[best_i] = true
    used[best_j] = true
    total += best_value
  end
  
  total
end

def main()
  t = gets.to_i
  
  t.times do
    n, k = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
    devices = []
    
    n.times do
      d, p, u = gets.split.map(&:to_i)
      devices << [d, p, u]
    end
    
    if n <= 16
      puts solve_small(devices, k)
    else
      puts solve_greedy(devices, k)
    end
  end
end

def check(X, devices, K):
    n = len(devices)
    
    adj = [[] for _ in range(3)]
    for i in range(n):
        d, p, u = devices[i]
        adj[0].append((d, i))
        adj[1].append((p, i))
        adj[2].append((u, i))
    
    for j in range(3):
        adj[j].sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    
    matched = [False] * n
    count = 0
    
    ptrs_l = [0, 0, 0]
    ptrs_r = [n - 1, n - 1, n - 1]
    
    for j in range(3):
        while ptrs_l[j] < ptrs_r[j]:
            l_idx = adj[j][ptrs_l[j]][1]
            r_idx = adj[j][ptrs_r[j]][1]
            
            if matched[l_idx]:
                ptrs_l[j] += 1
                continue
            if matched[r_idx]:
                ptrs_r[j] -= 1
                continue
            
            if adj[j][ptrs_l[j]][0] + adj[j][ptrs_r[j]][0] >= X:
                matched[l_idx] = True
                matched[r_idx] = True
                count += 1
                ptrs_l[j] += 1
                ptrs_r[j] -= 1
            else:
                ptrs_l[j] += 1
                
    return count >= K

def solve()

  return if input.empty?

  t.times do

def check(x, devices, k)
  sets = Array.new(3) { [] }
  devices.each_with_index do |d, i|
    sets[0] << [d[0], i]
    sets[1] << [d[1], i]
    sets[2] << [d[2], i]
  end
  
  3.times { |i| sets[i].sort! }
  
  adj = Array.new(devices.size) { [] }
  3.times do |dim|
    left = 0
    right = devices.size - 1
    while left < right
      if sets[dim][left][0] + sets[dim][right][0] >= x
        (right).downto(left + 1) do |r_idx|
          if sets[dim][left][0] + sets[dim][r_idx][0] >= x
            adj[sets[dim][left][1]] << sets[dim][r_idx][1]
            adj[sets[dim][r_idx][1]] << sets[dim][left][1]
          else
            break
          end
        end
        left += 1
      else
        left += 1
      end
    end
  end

  max_matching_size = greedy_matching_with_check(x, devices, k)
  max_matching_size >= k
end

def greedy_matching_with_check(x, devices, k)
  n = devices.size
  used = Array.new(n, false)
  count = 0
  
  3.times do |dim|
    sorted = devices.each_with_index.map { |d, i| [d[dim], i] }.sort_by { |v| -v[0] }
    
    l = 0
    r = n - 1
    
    temp_used = used.dup
    temp_count = count
    
    indices = (0...n).sort_by { |i| -devices[i][dim] }
    
    ii = 0
    jj = n - 1
    while ii < jj
      idx_i = indices[ii]
      idx_j = indices[jj]
      
      if temp_used[idx_i]
        ii += 1
        next
      end
      if temp_used[idx_j]
        jj -= 1
        next
      end
      
      if devices[idx_i][dim] + devices[idx_j][dim] >= x
        temp_count += 1
        temp_used[idx_i] = true
        temp_used[idx_j] = true
        ii += 1
        jj -= 1
      else
        jj -= 1
      end
    end
    return temp_count if temp_count >= k
  end
  
  0
end
